note: Metamorphic copies were deduped against the original's own seen-set entry: the copy re-generation hit unique's dedup and redrew, so identity metamorph pairs had unequal halves and the tree no longer determined the value. Fixed 2026-07-12 (Chris's ruling: copies are exempt from deduping) by snapshotting the unique seen-state around the copy loop in all three generation interpreters; see MetamorphUniqueRegressionTests.
